expectations.text: Runs clams login or checks clams status as the first step
expectations.evidence: Step 1: `clams status --machine --format json`, then Step 2: `clams login` if not authenticated.

expectations.text: Runs clams workspaces create with a label
Runs clams profiles create with workspace ID
Runs clams context set to set the default profile
Runs clams onchain create with --kind Electrum and the user's server URL
expectations.evidence: Step 7: `clams onchain create --label "Blockstream Electrum" --kind Electrum --url ssl://electrum.blockstream.info:50002 --select --machine --format json`

expectations.text: Runs clams connections create --kind XPub with the user's xpub
expectations.evidence: Step 8: Full config with xpub, address_types, gap_limit, wallet_first_tx_block_height, network.

expectations.text: Runs clams connections sync after creating the connection
expectations.evidence: Step 9: `clams connections sync --label "Coldcard Cold Storage" --machine --format json`

expectations.text: Runs clams journals process after syncing
Runs clams reports balance-sheet to show the user their balance
Commands that need parsed output use --machine --format json
expectations.evidence: All programmatic commands use --machine --format json; display commands use --format plain.
